subject: Elizabeth Warren [add your name!]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Hey there - We're so excited to welcome Senator Elizabeth Warren to Nevada tomorrow! She'll be speaking to fired up Democrats from all across our state.
She knows that if we want to flip this seat and the Senate blue - and hold President Trump accountable - we've got to do everything we can to win here in Nevada.

[**We need 1,000 supporters to sign the card before she arrives to welcome her to the Silver State. Can you add your name?**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd717/4fbb2af3/7f7171b3/5e8bec9a/3301848154/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5MDUzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGs3OTAtZnItbmQifQ==/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/s/elizabeth-warren-in-reno?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&source=jtk790-fr-nd")
[](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd717/4fbb2af3/7f7171b3/5e8bec9a/3301848154/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5MDUzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGs3OTAtZnItbmQifQ==/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/s/elizabeth-warren-in-reno?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&source=jtk790-fr-nd")
Dean Heller is the most vulnerable Senator in the country this year. It's critical that we defeat him and send Jacky Rosen to the Senate in his place - but polls have us neck-and-neck. Health care for millions of Americans, funding for Planned Parenthood, and the future of the Supreme Court are at stake. So we're thrilled to have Elizabeth Warren alongside us in this important fight.

[**Please, add your name to our card to help us get 1,000 signatures for Elizabeth Warren before her visit.**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd717/4fbb2af3/7f7171b3/5e8bec9a/3301848154/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5MDUzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGs3OTAtZnItbmQifQ==/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/s/elizabeth-warren-in-reno?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&source=jtk790-fr-nd")
Thanks so much for being a part of this,
Team Rosen

P.S. If you're interested in joining us at our convention in Reno, [**RSVP here**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd717/4fbb2af3/7f7171b3/5e8bec9b/3301848154/VEsC/ "http://votenvdems.com/convention")!
**Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126**

1600 Daily REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=96d179f4414c2a958065ddb5602b11992a2b2fbc9e4a3ea8f50acc4a50909786780db262b59385c783623937454b9bf9a5c4dfb920fa0842

First Lady Melania Trump Makes Surprise Visit to Texas Shelter, Seeks To ‘Quickly’ Reunite Families

- The Washington Times

First Lady Melania Trump visited a shelter in McAllen, Texas, on Thursday “to thank law enforcement officials and social service providers for their work,” Dave Boyer and Stephen Dinan report. The First Lady also met children at the Upbring New Hope Children’s Shelter, which is run by Lutheran Social Services.

-------------------------

Poster Child for Family Separation Was Never Separated from Her Mother at the Border

- Washington Examiner

Trump is in Nevada today -- and he's stumping for my opponent, Senator Dean Heller. He wants to make sure Heller is re-elected so he doesn't lose one of his favorite rubber stamps in the Senate.

Hi, Derek, I'm Jacky -- and with your help, I'm going to beat Donald Trump's favorite senator in November. Trump is in Nevada today -- and he's stumping for my opponent, Senator Dean Heller. He wants to make sure Heller is re-elected so he doesn't lose one of his favorite rubber stamps in the Senate. The path to taking back the Senate runs through Nevada. It will be incredibly difficult for Democrats to regain a majority if we don't win here. So before Trump walks into this fundraiser, it would mean so much to have your support. We won't be able to flip the Senate without winning this seat -- will you make a $10 contribution to my campaign and to Democrats nationwide? "" "" "" "" "" "" Let's get this straight: Dean Heller is not the right choice for Nevadans. Last summer, he supported a radical Republican repeal bill that would cause hundreds of thousands of Nevadans to lose their health care, slash coverage protections for people with pre-existing conditions, and force many older Nevadans to pay thousands more -- all because he caved in to Trump. I am ready to take on Donald Trump in the Senate. But I can't do it without your help. "" Thanks for your support, Jacky Rosen U.S. Senate candidate, Nevada P.S. Dean Heller is the most vulnerable GOP senator up for re-election in the fall. ""

body:

---
Friends,
A child's path to success starts with a quality education. But Betsy DeVos, Chris Sununu and Frank Edelblut are working tirelessly to weaken our public schools and deny our children the opportunities they deserve.
If they get their way, DeVos, Sununu and Edelblut will slash funding from our public education system to create a voucher program for private and religious schools. Sununu clearly doesn't care about how this would devastate New Hampshire's public schools and raise property taxes.
**We need to stand up for our students and hardworking families to make sure they get the opportunities they deserve, but I can 't do it alone. That's why I need 5,000 folks to speak out before midnight to join me in this fight.**
**[If you're with me, add your name now to tell Betsy DeVos: Protect our public schools!](https://mollykelly.bsd. Eric

name: Alana
subject: Wednesday, November 7, 2018
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
I have a thought exercise for you. It's the future -- specifically, Wednesday, November 7, 2018. The day after the election. |
---

| | Peter -- I have a thought exercise for you. It's the future -- specifically, Wednesday, November 7, 2018. The day after the election.

You open the _Indy Star_ , and the headline is "Republican Braun Defeats Donnelly in Nail-Biter." You turn on the TV, and there's Mitch McConnell grinning wide as he discusses his plans to privatize Medicare. You open up Facebook, and it's article after article about how President Trump is taking last night's big Republican wins as an endorsement of every piece of his agenda.

**Sound like a nightmare? It could be our reality if we don 't fight our hearts out to win this election. [That's why I'm asking you for $10 to help Joe win and defeat Republican Rep. Mike Braun, President Trump's "copy machine."](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e24/7377f838/3cc6000d/51f92128/3875042173/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fightback?refcode=20180623.1nd&amount=10")** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e24/7377f838/3cc6000d/51f9212a/3875042173/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fightback?express_lane=true&refcode=20180623.1nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e24/7377f838/3cc6000d/51f92125/3875042173/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fightback?express_lane=true&refcode=20180623.1nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e24/7377f838/3cc6000d/51f92124/3875042173/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fightback?express_lane=true&refcode=20180623.1nd&amount=100")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e24/7377f838/3cc6000d/51f92127/3875042173/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fightback?refcode=20180623.1nd")**
There's another way this could go. You wake up on Wednesday, November 7. You open the _Indy Star_ , and the headline is "Donnelly beats Braun, keeps seat." You breathe a sigh of relief.

On the TV, Mitch McConnell looks sullen discussing how his rubber stamp was defeated soundly. On Facebook, family members are relieved because they know their health care is safe with Joe in the Senate.

**Here 's the thing: This second outcome only happens if _we make it happen_. If you sit back and do nothing, we'll get the nightmare scenario on November 7. [But if you give us the resources, we can execute our campaign plan and WIN this election.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e24/7377f838/3cc6000d/51f92128/3875042173/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fightback?refcode=20180623.1nd&amount=10")**

The press is calling Joe the most vulnerable Democrat in the entire Senate, Peter -- and Nate Silver thinks this race could go either way. Let's make sure it goes the right way.

Thanks,

Alana
Digital Director

| | Friends,

In the July 17th runoff election for Congress, the choice is clear. When serving you in Congress, Democrat Bobby Bright supported Barack Obama, the most liberal president of my lifetime. He also took $300,000 in campaign contributions from Democrats in Washington.

With his first vote in Congress representing the people of AL-02, Bobby Bright voted to give Nancy Pelosi the Speaker's gavel, calling the decision a "no-brainer."

On July 17th, I would be honored to have your support. As a lifelong conservative Republican, I have never and would never vote to make Nancy Pelosi Speaker. I will always fight for **_you_** and the conservative values we hold dear.

Please [watch and share my first campaign ad](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=108A130A9A3742) highlighting Democrat Bobby Bright's record in Congress. **
**
-Martha

name: Team Bredesen
subject: IMPORTANT “Philbert” UPDATE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Peter --
You might have heard about Philbert — the cat who wandered into our campaign headquarters and stole our hearts. A couple weeks ago, we sent an email (see below) about how we’re teaming up with The Cat Shoppe in Nashville to help him find a good Tennessee home, and we wanted to give you a quick update.
Philbert now weighs 2 pounds, 2 ounces. He has gained 9 ounces in two weeks, but still needs to grow another 14 ounces before he can get his shots and get adopted.
He loves his tower that a kind volunteer got for him. He runs around it and climbs on top of it to swat the balls. He is a total Energizer kitten. He plays constantly until his battery runs out and then he falls over and takes a nap.
[**Once Philbert has had his shots, he’ll be ready for adoption, so we wanted to check in with you again to see if you might be interested in adopting Philbert or know someone who would be! Add your name here to get updates on Philbert’s status or to get in touch with the campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1476600/7987153/901859207?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzUxYmU1NS0xYjc3LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=il6u4h4Kc4gEp8laYvVQeU3syVjVryZPuHEGdXkdPbg=&emci=cc5b0c51-1077-e811-80c2-000d3a12b2b9&emdi=a351be55-1b77-e811-80c2-000d3a12b2b9&ceid=3972407&smartlinkdata=JmZuPVBldGVyJmVtPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclNDBnbWFpbC5jb20mY2k9TGViYW5vbiZzdD1UTiZwYz0zNzA4Nw%3D%3D)
[Get Philbert Updates](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1476601/7987154/901859207?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzUxYmU1NS0xYjc3LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=il6u4h4Kc4gEp8laYvVQeU3syVjVryZPuHEGdXkdPbg=&emci=cc5b0c51-1077-e811-80c2-000d3a12b2b9&emdi=a351be55-1b77-e811-80c2-000d3a12b2b9&ceid=3972407&smartlinkdata=JmZuPVBldGVyJmVtPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclNDBnbWFpbC5jb20mY2k9TGViYW5vbiZzdD1UTiZwYz0zNzA4Nw%3D%3D)
Thank you for your help,
\-- Team Philbert
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Bredesen for Senate** <info@bredesen.us>
Date: Wed, June 11, 2018
Subject: Now we know who “Philbert” really is... FWD: “Philbert”
To: Supporters
Peter--
A few weeks ago, our campaign manager sent you an email about a mysterious “Philbert” -- turns out, this is him:
Displaying an interest in American politics at an early age, Philbert wandered into our campaign office on Friday, and he’s stolen our hearts. Now we’re teaming up with The Cat Shoppe in Nashville to help find Philbert a good home here in Tennessee.
[**We wanted to check in with you and see if you could either help us find a new home for Philbert, or if you’d like to make Philbert a part of your own family! Add your name here to get updates on Philbert’s journey, and then share with your friends so we can find a home for him!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1476602/7987155/901859207?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzUxYmU1NS0xYjc3LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=il6u4h4Kc4gEp8laYvVQeU3syVjVryZPuHEGdXkdPbg=&emci=cc5b0c51-1077-e811-80c2-000d3a12b2b9&emdi=a351be55-1b77-e811-80c2-000d3a12b2b9&ceid=3972407&smartlinkdata=JmZuPVBldGVyJmVtPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclNDBnbWFpbC5jb20mY2k9TGViYW5vbiZzdD1UTiZwYz0zNzA4Nw%3D%3D)
[Get Philbert Updates](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1476603/7987156/901859207?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzUxYmU1NS0xYjc3LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=il6u4h4Kc4gEp8laYvVQeU3syVjVryZPuHEGdXkdPbg=&emci=cc5b0c51-1077-e811-80c2-000d3a12b2b9&emdi=a351be55-1b77-e811-80c2-000d3a12b2b9&ceid=3972407&smartlinkdata=JmZuPVBldGVyJmVtPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclNDBnbWFpbC5jb20mY2k9TGViYW5vbiZzdD1UTiZwYz0zNzA4Nw%3D%3D)
As an update, Mr. Philbert passed his first physical with flying colors: good blood work, all of his teeth have grown in. Dr. King at Elm Hill Vet estimates that he is 7-8 weeks old, barely weaned. He's currently 1.6 lbs. Once he gets to three lbs, he can get his shots. That should take about 2-3 weeks. Then he'll be ready to go to a good home.
He is already using a litter box, is very playful, and eats like a horse. He's still just a touch skittish, so we keep him enclosed in safe spots (kittens are experts at finding hiding places where you will never find them). He gets a little less skittish with each passing hour.

Peter,

Run to Win is coming to Richmond!

In August, my team and I will be in Virginia to train women on the basics of running for office. And we want you to join us!

Run to Win 101 is a free, half-day introductory training for women thinking about running for office.

You don't need to be a declared candidate or even actively planning to run to attend. You just have to have an interest in learning the basics of being a candidate for state or local office.

**[Apply to attend our Run to Win 101 training in Richmond on Saturday, August 11th, 2018.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4000/24c69fd9/19ab6433c/18803968/256298426/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20180419_email_RunToWinRichmond?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Apply+to+attend+our+Run+to+Win+101+train&utm_campaign=WQENER64_digital_email_20180623_RtWRichmondTraining&source=WQENER64_digital_email_20180623_RtWRichmondTraining")**
**WHAT:**
Run to Win 101
A free, half-day training for pro-choice Democratic women thinking about running for elected office

**WHEN:**
Saturday, August 11th, 2018
9:30 a.m. -- 2:30 p.m.

**WHERE:**
Richmond, VA
[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4000/24c69fd9/19ab6433c/18803969/256298426/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20180419_email_RunToWinRichmond?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQENER64_digital_email_20180623_RtWRichmondTraining&source=WQENER64_digital_email_20180623_RtWRichmondTraining")
We'll guide you through the nuts and bolts of planning your run, teach you how to get your campaign in order, and get you ready to take the first steps toward running -- and winning.

This is the last training we're holding in Virginia this year, so make sure to apply and don't miss this opportunity to learn more about running for state or local office.

Space is limited and seats are being offered on a first-come, first-served basis.

**Submit your application to attend Run to Win 101:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Run-To-Win-Richmond](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4000/24c69fd9/19ab6433c/1880396a/256298426/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20180419_email_RunToWinRichmond?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgRunToWinRichmond&utm_campaign=WQENER64_digital_email_20180623_RtWRichmondTraining&source=WQENER64_digital_email_20180623_RtWRichmondTraining")**

Hope to see you there,

Mũthoni Wambu Kraal
Vice President of National Outreach and Training, EMILY's List

subject: Give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
I would not ask if it were not important.
#

Peter -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to our campaign for Attorney General. I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request is so important:
In this race, we're up against the political and financial establishment. Albany and Wall Street have their hand-picked candidates, and they're likely going to have unlimited sums of money from big donors and corporate interests to try to stop us.
That's not how we're funding this race. The overwhelming majority of our donations come from supporters like you giving small amounts of money in response to emails like this. I am very proud of that fact.
Now let me be clear: I have no doubt that we can win. But I cannot do it alone. Our only chance is if we are in this together.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: FWD: We're suing Trump for separating families.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We just sued Donald Trump for his cruel and unconstitutional immigration policies.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78de8/2f5ea88d/7071aa66/2cbce59c/1092074727/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/washington-sues-on-immigration?utm_source=ema_2018-06-22_wa-lawsuit-fwd&source=ema_2018-06-22_wa-lawsuit-fwd&utm_campaign=wa-lawsuit-fwd&utm_medium=ema") Dear Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw: **We just sued the Trump administration over its inhumane family separation policies.** Don't be fooled by Trump's executive order -- it doesn't fix the mess he created. Trump's order trades one policy that's harmful to children for another policy that's harmful to children. And there are 2,300 families that have yet to be reunited with their families. The administration currently has no plans for how to make that happen. We cannot let Donald Trump turn these peaceful asylum seekers into orphans. [**Trump's immigration policy is rogue, cruel, and unconstitutional -- that's why we're suing him here in Washington state. Add your name to join in support of our lawsuit against Trump and his cruel administration, and let's reunite these families.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78de8/2f5ea88d/7071aa66/2cbce59c/1092074727/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/washington-sues-on-immigration?utm_source=ema_2018-06-22_wa-lawsuit-fwd&source=ema_2018-06-22_wa-lawsuit-fwd&utm_campaign=wa-lawsuit-fwd&utm_medium=ema") | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78de8/2f5ea88d/7071aa66/2cbce59c/1092074727/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/washington-sues-on-immigration?utm_source=ema_2018-06-22_wa-lawsuit-fwd&source=ema_2018-06-22_wa-lawsuit-fwd&utm_campaign=wa-lawsuit-fwd&utm_medium=ema")
---
Very truly yours,
Gov. Jay Inslee
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Thursday, June 21, 2018
Subject: We're suing Trump for separating families
Friend,
When toddlers and infants are forcibly separated from their parents and sent far away, something is wrong. When parents are stuffed into cages for indefinite detainment and have no way to find their children, our immigration system is broken.
**This is not who we are.**
Trump's executive order yesterday is not fooling anyone. They say they will only keep families together when they deem it to be "appropriate." They aim to detain children AND their parents, indefinitely. They have no plans to reunite the 2,300 separated children with their parents.
**This is un-American!**
Friend, children should never be bargaining chips to push through destructive border policy. **And that's why we're suing the Trump administration right now.**
[**Trump's immigration policy is rogue, cruel, and unconstitutional. And we're going to put a stop to it. Add your name to show your support for our lawsuit against Trump and his cruel administration.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78de8/2f5ea88d/7071aa66/2cbce59c/1092074727/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/washington-sues-on-immigration?utm_source=ema_2018-06-22_wa-lawsuit-fwd&source=ema_2018-06-22_wa-lawsuit-fwd&utm_campaign=wa-lawsuit-fwd&utm_medium=ema")
[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78de8/2f5ea88d/7071aa66/2cbce59c/1092074727/VEsD/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/washington-sues-on-immigration?utm_source=ema_2018-06-22_wa-lawsuit-fwd&source=ema_2018-06-22_wa-lawsuit-fwd&utm_campaign=wa-lawsuit-fwd&utm_medium=ema")
---
In such an important, heartbreaking moment for our country, the Trump administration must be held legally accountable for policies that inflict abuse on immigrant children and parents. We must act now to find a solution for this crisis. **That's why we're filing this lawsuit.**
Whatever Trump does next, one thing we know for sure is Washington state will always be among the first to stand up for the people and the values that make our state and our nation an enduring beacon of hope and opportunity.
[**So stand with us against the Trump administration as they continue to debase our values and leave children traumatized. Add your name to show the grassroots power behind our lawsuit -- and let's reunite these families.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78de8/2f5ea88d/7071aa66/2cbce59c/1092074727/VEsA/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/washington-sues-on-immigration?utm_source=ema_2018-06-22_wa-lawsuit-fwd&source=ema_2018-06-22_wa-lawsuit-fwd&utm_campaign=wa-lawsuit-fwd&utm_medium=ema")
[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78de8/2f5ea88d/7071aa66/2cbce59c/1092074727/VEsB/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/washington-sues-on-immigration?utm_source=ema_2018-06-22_wa-lawsuit-fwd&source=ema_2018-06-22_wa-lawsuit-fwd&utm_campaign=wa-lawsuit-fwd&utm_medium=ema")
---
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:

| | You and I aren't the only ones upset that the Trump administration wants to gut protections for people with pre-existing conditions. **Today I'm teaming up with like-minded colleagues and organizations to build a grassroots movement to stop it.** [**Will you join us? Demand the Trump administration stop attacking the Affordable Care Act and protect Americans with pre-existing conditions.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f3b/622b7b5b/1b6adf45/307b9fea/2593037234/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/ja180621") The Trump administration just announced they will stop defending key tenets of the Affordable Care Act in court. It's another step in their convoluted, under-the-radar scheme to destroy the ACA bit by bit. They're hoping their announcement is too much insider-baseball for anyone to understand it. **But we understand it.** We understand the Trump administration is turning us back to the days when insurance companies could charge people more -- or deny coverage entirely -- if they have a pre-existing condition. And that's why we need you to step up. We cannot be silent. We will not let this go without a fight. [**Join me. Add your name to our petition >>**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f3b/622b7b5b/1b6adf45/307b9fea/2593037234/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/ja180621") I'll be doing everything I can to protect the thousands of Floridians and millions across the country living with pre-existing conditions. Thank you for standing with me. Debbie Wasserman Schultz

name: Tom Wolf
subject: re: the budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | **Just last night, I signed our 2018 budget.**

Both Republicans and Democrats came together to make smart investments in education, combating the opioid crisis, protecting seniors, and expanding workforce training to help bring more good paying jobs to Pennsylvania. It's a responsible and bipartisan plan that I'm proud to support.

After fully restoring the massive education cuts made in the previous administration, we're now investing an additional $190 million in public education so that we can make sure that our children are getting the best education possible to succeed. And businesses only want to invest in states that invest in their future.

We have also dedicated additional $70 million to fund school safety programs that are critical to protecting our children.

Our budget also includes a first-of-its-kind $30 million strategic investment in job training and workforce development so students and workers gain the 21st century skills to get good jobs that employers demand.

**But listen, let me remind you that our fight is far from over.**

Over the past three years, we've been able to accomplish so much together. Now that this year's budget is complete, it is imperative that we all continue to work together to focus on moving Pennsylvania in the right direction.

Since day one, I've promised to change Harrisburg by prioritizing issues important to Pennsylvania families. That's what we've been able to do with this budget. And that's what I hope to as your Governor for another four years.

I'm proud of the work we've done together, and hopeful for the work we'll continue to do together to change Harrisburg.

Onward,

Tom Wolf

Peter, Please join me and special guest Renea Hicks for a discussion of the legal fight to end gerrymandering in Texas. Renea is the lawyer who has sued the State of Texas all the way to the Supreme Court and will be sharing his experience with us at Stiles Switch BBQ on Sunday, June 24, at 4:00 p.m. Renea’s background includes service as the Texas solicitor general under Governor Ann Richards. Last month, he argued at the Supreme Court on behalf of plaintiffs including the City of Austin – challenging discriminatory maps that were adopted by the Republican Legislature in 2011. The maps disenfranchise Hispanic voters, African-American voters, and urban Democratic voters across the State. I've spent the last year-and-a-half in Washington fighting for hard-working families and working to hold President Trump accountable. We've fought together on everything from preserving CHIP, to defending net neutrality, to protecting our shorelines from drilling. But corporate special interests and President Trump's allies want to defeat Annie in NH-02, and if they succeed, our chances of taking back the House are zero.

name: Martin Sheen
subject: A note from a former president
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter. I'm Martin Sheen. I may not be a real-life President, but there are three things I've learned about real-life politics. First: What's happening right now in America is not normal. The rhetoric coming from Washington is hateful and in opposition to the values of inclusion and equality America was built on. Second: To protect the principles we care so deeply about from the extremely partisan atmosphere -- like access to health care, a secure retirement, or investments in education or infrastructure -- we need to keep good lawmakers in place. **Senator Sherrod Brown is one of those lawmakers.** He doesn't just talk about progressive values; he embodies them. He fights for them. He's an authentic leader. Third: **We need to step up.** Never doubt that a group of concerned citizens, however small, can make a big difference. [**Peter, I'm asking you to help Sherrod. His FEC deadline is in 7 days, and he needs to reach $600,000.
